title: callitriche sessilis var. verna
intro: Callitriche sessilis var. verna, also known as dwarf water-starwort or vernal water-starwort, is a rare aquatic plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Callitriche sessilis var. verna are associated with its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is often prepared in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its herbal preparations are primarily used for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects.
